description: Brand + art-direction contract for the EdTech Daily Digest hero illustration. Consumed by the Hermes agent (Matilda) when generating the weekly hero. This is the single source of truth for palette, composition, and output spec.
oneLineStyle: flat, minimal, geometric editorial vector illustration - airy, lots of negative space, thin rounded strokes, a soft teal circular backdrop, and a friendly 'graduated AI' motif
composition: single centered subject on a soft teal disc; a friendly 'graduated AI' network motif (nodes + thin connecting strokes) with an optional graduation cap; 3-5 accent nodes; at most one theme prop; generous negative space; symmetrical, calm balance

do: flat vector shapes with thin, rounded strokes
keep it airy with lots of negative space

negativePrompt: text, words, letters, watermark, signature, gradient, drop shadow, glow, 3d render, photorealistic, photograph, clutter, busy background, extra fingers, low quality, jpeg artifacts

themeProps.skills: graduation cap over a small network of nodes
themeProps.dataready: tidy stacked data cylinders feeding a single node
themeProps.legal: a simple gavel or balanced scales
themeProps.threats: a shield with a small keyhole
themeProps.human: two cupped hands or a heart-handshake
themeProps.global: a simple globe with orbiting nodes
themeProps.consolidation: two arrows merging into one node
themeProps.default: the graduated-AI network mascot with no extra prop
